ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_index" TEXT /* Index of the image in the dataset */,
  "finding_labels" TEXT /* Labels describing findings in the image */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Follow-up number associated with the findings */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of imaging */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "view_position" TEXT /* Position of the view (e.g., PA for Posteroanterior) */,
  "original_image_width" INTEGER /* Width of the original image in pixels */,
  "original_image_height" INTEGER /* Height of the original image in pixels */,
  "original_image_pixel_spacing_x" REAL /* Pixel spacing in the x-direction */,
  "original_image_pixel_spacing_y" REAL /* Pixel spacing in the y-direction */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., DICOM, JPEG) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_view_position FOREIGN KEY ("view_position") REFERENCES view_positions ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_finding_labels FOREIGN KEY ("finding_labels") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding */,
  "finding_name" TEXT /* Name of the finding (e.g., Cardiomegaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the finding */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the finding (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code associated with the finding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up action */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finding that prompted the follow-up */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended action based on the finding */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Recommended time frame for the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_positions" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the view position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the view position */,
  "image_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the image (e.g., upright, supine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., radiologist, technician, admin) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the user (e.g., cardiology, pulmonology) */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the image was accessed (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finding detected */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finding the recommendation is based on */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with this metadata */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of image acquisition */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study conducted (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for image acquisition */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for image acquisition */,
  "scanner_settings" TEXT /* Scanner settings used for image acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with this audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with this notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_portals" (
  "portal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portal entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who accessed the portal */,
  "portal_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient accessed the portal */,
  "portal_type" TEXT /* Type of portal access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "portal_description" TEXT /* Description of the portal activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_portals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
